pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh queries explicitly target unique_identifier = 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh queries explicitly target label = 'DM-101'.
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh queries explicitly target name = 'Week 4 Follow-up'.
The task description instructions explicitly request the start date of April 15, 2024 (2024-04-15) for Cycle 2.
The task description instructions explicitly request the start date of May 13, 2024 (2024-05-13) for Cycle 3.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openclinica_env manage_repeating_visit_cycles task by confirming that the active study 'DM-TRIAL-2024', subject 'DM-101', and event definition 'Week 4 Follow-up' are synthetically generated and explicitly injected via setup_task.sh PostgreSQL queries. Verified the expected dates for Cycle 2 ('2024-04-15') and Cycle 3 ('2024-05-13') directly match the task description instructions. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
